title: Fix trailing extras stripping in doReduce (comment placement)
description: doReduce in parser.go (lines 646-729) is missing the trailing extras stripping step. In C tree-sitter, ts_parser__reduce calls ts_subtree_array_remove_trailing_extras to strip trailing comments from children before creating the parent node, then re-pushes them onto the stack as siblings. Our doReduce collects all extras during Stack.Pop and includes them as children. Fix: after reversing children, walk backward to remove trailing extras to a buffer, create parent without them, then re-push extras after pushing parent. ~15-20 line change. Impact: ~56 comment tests across 10 languages.
